steps.title: Identify the relationship between ideas
steps.content: Italian was the standard language for opera for centuries; now singers encounter Italian terms in old scores. The logical relationship is cause-and-effect: historical dominance explains present experience.

steps.title: Match the transition
steps.content: Consequently expresses that the second idea follows logically from the first. The other three all presume relationships not present: However assumes an unexpected reversal, Lastly assumes a series conclusion, and Granted assumes a concession before counterargument. That matches choice A — A is correct.
